title: COLUMBIA INN - 211info
text: COLUMBIA INN EMERGENCY SHELTER COLUMBIA INN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter with up to 64 beds. 495 Marine Drive Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Families with children experiencing homelessness, individuals and families escaping domestic violence, and youth age 18-24 Prioritizes families with children, individuals with mobility-affecting disabilities, and individuals who are part of the Latinx, 2SLGBTQIA+, and Veteran communities Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8:30am-3:30pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 325-1400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-1400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred through coordinated entry FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Community Shelters * Domestic Violence Issues Community Shelters * Homeless Families Community Shelters * Homeless Veterans Community Shelters * Homeless Youth Community Shelters * LGBTQ2+ Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
